framework.name: Secure Digital Communication and Digital Government Infrastructure
framework.name_nl: Saker digital kommunikation och digital samverkan
framework.scope: DIGG requirements for secure digital communication (SDK), API management, digital collaboration, and e-ID (Sweden Connect) for Swedish public sector
framework.structure_description: Organized by area: Secure Digital Communication/SDK (SDK-1 to SDK-4, SDK-21 to SDK-22), API management (SDK-5 to SDK-8, SDK-16 to SDK-18), digital collaboration (SDK-9 to SDK-11, SDK-23 to SDK-25), and e-ID/Sweden Connect (SDK-12 to SDK-15, SDK-19 to SDK-20).

controls.title: SDK compliance for government messaging
controls.description: Government agencies exchanging sensitive information electronically shall use SDK-compliant infrastructure.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheter som utbyter kanslig information elektroniskt ska anvanda SDK-kompatibel infrastruktur.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anslut till SDK-plattformen. Sakerstall att meddelandeinfrastruktur uppfyller SDK-specifikationen.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att SDK-anslutning ar genomford och testad.

controls.title: Message-level encryption in SDK
controls.description: Messages in SDK shall be encrypted end-to-end using approved cryptographic methods.
controls.description_nl: Meddelanden i SDK ska krypteras and-till-and med godkanda kryptografiska metoder.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera meddelandekryptering enligt SDK-specifikationen. Anvand X.509-certifikat for signering och kryptering.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att meddelandekryptering ar aktiv och att certifikat ar giltiga.

controls.title: Recipient verification in SDK
controls.description: Message recipients shall be verified through the SDK address book before transmission.
controls.description_nl: Meddelandemottagare ska verifieras genom SDK:s adressbok fore overforing.
controls.implementation_guidance: Integrera med SDK:s adressbok for mottagarverifiering. Sakerstall att mottagarens identitet bekraftas.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att mottagarverifiering fungerar korrekt.

controls.title: Message delivery receipts in SDK
controls.description: Delivery receipts shall be generated for all messages to ensure traceability and non-repudiation.
controls.description_nl: Leveranskvittenser ska genereras for alla meddelanden for att sakerstalla sparbarhet och oforheklerligbhet.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurera leveranskvittenser for alla SDK-meddelanden. Arkivera kvittenser for revisionsandamal.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att leveranskvittenser genereras och arkiveras.

controls.title: API authentication standard
controls.description: Government APIs shall use OAuth 2.0 or OpenID Connect for authentication and authorization.
controls.description_nl: Myndighets-API:er ska anvanda OAuth 2.0 eller OpenID Connect for autentisering och behorighetskontroll.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera OAuth 2.0/OIDC for API-autentisering. Anvand korta tokenlivstider och token-fornyelse.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att API-autentisering anvander godkanda protokoll.

controls.title: API rate limiting and throttling
controls.description: APIs shall implement rate limiting to protect against abuse and denial-of-service.
controls.description_nl: API:er ska implementera hastighetsbegransning for att skydda mot missbruk och overbelastningsattacker.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurera hastighetsbegransning per API-nyckel och per IP-adress. Returnera Retry-After vid begransning.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att hastighetsbegransning ar konfigurerad for alla API:er.

controls.title: API input validation
controls.description: All API inputs shall be validated to prevent injection attacks and data corruption.
controls.description_nl: All indata till API:er ska valideras for att forhindra injektionsattacker och dataforstoring.
controls.implementation_guidance: Validera all indata mot schema. Avvisa ogiltig indata med tydliga felmeddelanden. Anvand Content-Type-validering.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att indatavalidering ar implementerad for alla API-andpunkter.

controls.title: API documentation with OpenAPI
controls.description: APIs shall be documented using OpenAPI Specification (OAS) and registered in the national API catalog.
controls.description_nl: API:er ska dokumenteras med OpenAPI Specification (OAS) och registreras i den nationella API-katalogen.
controls.implementation_guidance: Dokumentera alla API:er med OpenAPI 3.0+. Publicera i Sveriges dataportal.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att API-dokumentation ar komplett och registrerad.

controls.title: Interoperability security requirements
controls.description: Cross-agency data exchange shall implement security at transport, message, and application levels.
controls.description_nl: Datautbyte mellan myndigheter ska implementera sakerhet pa transport-, meddelande- och applikationsniva.
controls.implementation_guidance: Tilllampa TLS for transportsakerhet. Implementera meddelandesignering. Validera indata pa applikationsniva.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att sakerkretskrav uppfylls pa alla nivaer.

controls.title: Cross-agency identity federation
controls.description: Identity federation between agencies shall use Sweden Connect with appropriate trust levels.
controls.description_nl: Identitetsfederation mellan myndigheter ska anvanda Sweden Connect med lampliga tillitsniver.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anslut till Sweden Connect for federerad inloggning. Matcha tillitsniva med informationens kanslighet.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att federationsanslutning fungerar och att tillitsniver ar korrekta.

controls.title: Semantic interoperability standards
controls.description: Data exchange formats shall follow nationally agreed semantic standards for consistency.
controls.description_nl: Datautbytesformat ska folja nationellt overenskomna semantiska standarder for konsekvens.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvand nationella informationsmodeller och vokabularer vid datautbyte.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att nationella standarder foljs vid datautbyte.

controls.title: e-ID trust level requirements
controls.description: Digital services requiring identity verification shall specify and enforce the appropriate e-ID trust level.
controls.description_nl: Digitala tjanster som kraver identitetsverifiering ska specificera och tilllampa lamplig tillitsniva for e-legitimation.
controls.implementation_guidance: Bedome vilken tillitsniva som kravs (lag, vaesentlig, hog). Stod BankID och Freja eID+. Tilllampa via Sweden Connect.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att ratt tillitsniva tilllampas for varje tjanst.

controls.title: Sweden Connect integration for public services
controls.description: Public sector digital services shall integrate with Sweden Connect for e-ID-based authentication.
controls.description_nl: Offentliga digitala tjanster ska integrera med Sweden Connect for e-legitimationsbaserad autentisering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Integrera med Sweden Connect. Stod minst BankID och Freja eID+. Implementera SAML 2.0.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att Sweden Connect-integration ar korrekt implementerad och testad.

controls.title: Qualified electronic signatures (QES)
controls.description: Where electronic signatures are required by law, qualified electronic signatures compliant with eIDAS shall be used.
controls.description_nl: Dar elektroniska signaturer kravs enligt lag ska kvalificerade elektroniska signaturer i enlighet med eIDAS anvandas.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera kvalificerad signeringstjanst. Sakerstall eIDAS-kompatibilitet.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att signaturtjansten ar kvalificerad enligt eIDAS.

controls.title: e-ID session management security
controls.description: Authenticated sessions shall implement timeout, re-authentication for sensitive operations, and secure session handling.
controls.description_nl: Autentiserade sessioner ska implementera timeout, forad autentisering for kansliga operationer och saker sessionshantering.
controls.implementation_guidance: Konfigurera sessionstimeout anpassad till riskniva. Krav forad autentisering vid kansliga atgarder.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att sessionshantering uppfyller sakerhetskraven.

controls.title: API versioning and deprecation policy
controls.description: Government APIs shall implement versioning and a documented deprecation policy to ensure backward compatibility.
controls.description_nl: Myndighets-API:er ska implementera versionering och en dokumenterad avvecklingspolicy for att sakerstalla bakatkkompatibilitet.
controls.implementation_guidance: Anvand semantisk versionering. Publicera avvecklingsschema minst 12 manader fore avveckling.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att versionering och avvecklingspolicy ar implementerade.

controls.title: API access logging and monitoring
controls.description: All API calls shall be logged with caller identity, timestamp, endpoint, and response status for audit purposes.
controls.description_nl: Alla API-anrop ska loggas med anroparidentitet, tidpunkt, andpunkt och svarsstatus for revisionsandamal.
controls.implementation_guidance: Logga alla API-anrop. Overvaka for anomalier och missbruksmonster. Lagra loggar minst 12 manader.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att API-loggning ar aktiv och att overvakning fungerar.

controls.title: API gateway security controls
controls.description: An API gateway shall enforce authentication, rate limiting, TLS termination, and request validation for all exposed APIs.
controls.description_nl: En API-gateway ska tilllampa autentisering, hastighetsbegransning, TLS-terminering och forfragevalidering for alla exponerade API:er.
controls.implementation_guidance: Implementera API-gateway framfor alla publika API:er. Konfigurera TLS, autentisering och hastighetsbegransning.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att API-gateway ar korrekt konfigurerad.

controls.title: Cross-border eID recognition (eIDAS)
controls.description: Swedish public services accepting national e-ID shall also accept notified eIDAS electronic identification from other EU member states.
controls.description_nl: Svenska offentliga tjanster som accepterar nationell e-legitimation ska ocksa acceptera anmalda eIDAS-elektroniska identifieringar fran andra EU-medlemsstater.
controls.implementation_guidance: Integrera eIDAS-noden via Sweden Connect. Acceptera eID pa vaesentlig eller hog tillitsniva fran andra EU-lander.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att gransoverskridande eID accepteras via eIDAS-noden.

controls.title: e-ID credential lifecycle management
controls.description: Organizations shall manage the full lifecycle of e-ID credentials including issuance, renewal, suspension, and revocation.
controls.description_nl: Organisationer ska hantera hela livscykeln for e-legitimationsuppgifter inklusive utfardande, fornyelse, suspendering och aterkallelse.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta rutiner for utfardande, fornyelse och aterkallelse av e-legitimationer. Definiera ansvar och tidsramar.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att livscykelhantering av e-legitimationer fungerar.

controls.title: SDK address book integrity
controls.description: Organizations connected to SDK shall keep their address book entries current and validate peer entries before sending messages.
controls.description_nl: Organisationer anslutna till SDK ska halla sina adressboksposter aktuella och validera motpartens poster fore meddelandesandning.
controls.implementation_guidance: Underhall aktuella adressboksposter. Validera mottagarens certifikat och organisationsuppgifter fore sandning.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att adressboksposter ar aktuella och att validering utfors.

controls.title: SDK audit logging
controls.description: All SDK message exchanges shall be audit-logged with sender, recipient, timestamp, and delivery status for accountability.
controls.description_nl: Alla SDK-meddelandeutbyten ska revisionsloggas med avsandare, mottagare, tidpunkt och leveransstatus for ansvarsskyldighet.
controls.implementation_guidance: Logga alla SDK-transaktioner. Lagra loggar minst 12 manader. Skydda loggar mot manipulation.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att SDK-transaktionsloggar finns och ar skyddade.

controls.title: Data exchange agreements between agencies
controls.description: Agencies exchanging data shall establish formal data exchange agreements defining security requirements, data ownership, and liability.
controls.description_nl: Myndigheter som utbyter data ska uppractta formella informationsutbytesavtal som definierar sakerhetskrav, dataagande och ansvar.
controls.implementation_guidance: Uppractta informationsutbytesavtal for alla delade datamangder. Definiera sakerhetskrav och ansvar.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att informationsutbytesavtal finns for alla datautbyten.

controls.title: Open data security classification
controls.description: Data intended for open publication shall be reviewed and classified to ensure no sensitive information is inadvertently disclosed.
controls.description_nl: Data avsedd for oppen publicering ska granskas och klassificeras for att sakerstalla att ingen kanslig information rojs av misstag.
controls.implementation_guidance: Granska datamangder fore publicering som oppna data. Kontrollera att inga personuppgifter eller sakerhhetskansliga uppgifter ingar.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att sakerhetsklassificering utfors fore publicering av oppna data.

controls.title: Digital collaboration platform security baseline
controls.description: Collaboration platforms used for inter-agency communication shall meet a defined security baseline including encryption and access control.
controls.description_nl: Samverkansplattformar for kommunikation mellan myndigheter ska uppfylla en definierad sakerhetsbaseline inklusive kryptering och atkomstkontroll.
controls.implementation_guidance: Definiera sakerhetsbaseline for samverkansplattformar. Krav TLS, MFA och loggning.
controls.verification_guidance: Kontrollera att samverkansplattformar uppfyller sakerhetsbaselinen.
